overall.description: Aerial descent through a futuristic cyberpunk city canyon at night, following two falling characters with glowing neon trails past towering corporate buildings including a prominent Militech headquarters. The camera maintains a smooth vertical drop perspective between high-rise structures toward a circular illuminated plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical urban canyon between corporate towers

events.description: descent continues past building mid-sections with falling figures maintaining relative positions

agents.ego_description: descending vertically through the urban canyon following two falling figures with neon trails

notable_agents.action: falling downward with orange neon trail, rotating slowly while descending
falling downward with blue neon trail, maintaining proximity to the orange figure

entered.detail: tall black corporate tower with prominent yellow neon MILITECH signage
high-rise building with orange and blue illuminated windows
circular street pattern with illuminated dots forming concentric rings far below
large yellow neon sign spelling MILITECH on the left tower facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude view looking down a narrow vertical canyon between two massive corporate towers. The Militech building dominates the left side with its bright yellow signage, while a contrasting tower rises on the right. Two figures with glowing neon trails—one orange and one blue—are falling through the center of the frame, and the camera follows their descent toward the circular illuminated street pattern far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching street level in corporate district

events.description: landing platform becomes visible as the descent approaches ground level

agents.ego_description: continuing descent approaching ground level, maintaining focus on the two falling figures as they near the landing area

notable_agents.action: falling downward with orange neon trail, approaching the landing platform rapidly
falling downward with blue neon trail, maintaining position adjacent to the orange figure

entered.detail: circular illuminated platform at street level becoming visible as the descent continues

segments.scene_description: The descent continues closer to ground level with the surrounding towers now filling the frame from nearby. The Militech signage and building details on the right tower become larger and more detailed. The circular plaza pattern below resolves into a distinct landing platform with bright illumination. The two falling characters with their neon trails continue their descent toward this platform, now much closer to the ground than in the previous segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vertical descent through a narrow cyberpunk canyon that transforms from a high-altitude plunge into a close-range approach toward a glowing urban plaza. It begins with a distant view looking down between two massive corporate towers, where the bright yellow signage of the Militech building dominates the left side. As the camera drops, two figures with orange and blue neon trails streak through the center of the frame, drawing the eye toward a circular illuminated pattern far below. The surrounding architecture then expands to fill the frame, bringing the intricate details of the towers and the Militech signage into sharp focus. Finally, the distant street pattern resolves into a distinct, brightly lit landing platform as the falling characters rapidly approach the ground.
